defs: The action of discovering; exposure to view; laying open; showing; as, the discovery of a plot.
A making known; revelation; disclosure; as, a bankrupt is bound to make a full discovery of his assets.
quotes: In the clear discoveries of the next [world].

defs: Finding out or ascertaining something previously unknown or unrecognized; as, Harvey's discovery of the circulation of the blood.
quotes: A brilliant career of discovery and conquest.
We speak of the “invention” of printing, the discovery of America.

defs: That which is discovered; a thing found out, or for the first time ascertained or recognized; as, the properties of the magnet were an important discovery.
